title: penstemon × princeps
intro: Penstemon × princeps, a hybrid plant known as Prince's Penstemon, is a cross between Penstemon eatonii and Penstemon palmeri, resulting in a unique and attractive flowering plant. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. Penstemon × princeps is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared in various ways, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
